docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CUNNINGHAM, GERARD DBA KOOLBIT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2014 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CUNNINGHAM, GERARD DBA KOOLBIT
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL *GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY GERARD CUNNINGHAM--CEO.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO GERARD CUNNINGHAM BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-03-2014 AT 3:30 PM.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KULBYT, LLC DBA KOOLBIT $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,140.00, DEFENDANT GERARD CUNNINGHAM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PARTIES AGREE THAT KOOLBIT IS THE PROPER DEFENDANT AND GERARD CUNNINGHAM AS CEO OF KULBYT, LLC, WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GOMEZ, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT CUNNINGHAM, GERARD DBA KOOLBIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) SERVED JAN-30-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CUNNINGHAM, GERARD DBA KOOLBIT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-03-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
